title: [Griffin's Keen, Topaz Point]
description: This steeply curved ledge winds around an ice-slicked bend and ends against the side of an uneven stone spire.  The craggy tops of other spires can be seen beyond it, forming a nearly straight line.  Where the spire and the mountainside meet, a long dark crevice looks wide enough to provide shelter.

wayto.4578: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'climb crevice'
wayto.4580: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
